manifests.description: Browser-accessible AI coding assistant. Connect your own LLM API keys — no local GPU required.
Sleek, feature-rich chat interface for local LLMs
Usenet binary newsreader and download manager

localai.description: Local OpenAI-compatible inference server. Runs LLMs, image generation, speech, and embeddings. Drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API — 36+ backends including llama.cpp, vLLM, Whisper, and Stable Diffusion. GPU acceleration for NVIDIA (CUDA), AMD (ROCm), Intel (SYCL), and Apple Silicon (Metal). Use as an inference provider for the SLOP Health Agent.

litellm.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM API proxy and router. Unify all your LLM backends — Ollama, llama.cpp, OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, and 100+ others — behind a single endpoint with key management, usage tracking, rate limiting, and automatic fallback. Configure apps once; swap backends without touching them.
